title: AI ‘Man Camps’ Offer Golf, Free Steaks to Lure Workers in Texas
description: Companies competing for workers to build data centers are finding that a motel room with sluggish Wi-Fi isn't much of a draw. Try free steaks and golf
ai_comment: Offering free steaks and golf to attract workers for data center construction may increase the appeal. However, consider the potential risks of such perks, including increased costs and the impact on company culture. Risk Score: 75. Not recommended.
